Data and Tools
NLR develops data and tools for the analysis of grid technologies and strategies, including renewable resource data sets and models of the electric power system.

Featured: MIDAS-Solar
MIDAS-Solar analyzes the impact of high penetrations of PV on power system dynamics,
                reliability, and economics.
Most Popular: Solar Spectra
View our full collection of solar spectral irradiance data in a variety of formats.
